accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text, including findings, operative provisions, and rule of construction.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all details trace to the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose of directing removal of U.S. Armed Forces from unauthorized hostilities against Iran.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly identifies the War Powers Resolution and the relevant expedited-procedure statutes invoked.

exceptions_conditions.why: Accurately describes the rule-of-construction carve-outs and the declaration-of-war/AUMF exception.

effective_dates.why: The bill specifies no effective date or sunset for the operative directive.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the removal directive, findings, and rule of construction faithfully.

objective_tone.why: Summary reports findings neutrally without endorsing or criticizing them.

coherent.why: Well-organized and internally consistent across paragraphs.

concise.why: Free of padding and repetition while covering essential content.

correct_entities.why: Senator Booker, the War Powers Resolution, and cited statutes are all correctly named.

correct_figures.why: The 50,000 personnel, 13 killed, 350+ injured, and dates match the bill text.
